message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "Webhook\nServer" as Server
participant "Consumer" as Consumer

== Register webhook ==

Admin -> Server : 1 Register webhook\nconsumer
Server --> Admin : 2 OK

== Event received ==

[-> Server : 3 Event
Server -> Server : 4 Store event\nin DB

== Consumer connected ==

Consumer -> Server : 5 Connect over WS

loop loop
    Server -> Server : 6 Load webhooks\nfrom DB
    Server -> Consumer : 7 Forward forwarding events
end

loop loop
    Consumer ..> Server : 8 Ack messages\nby webhook ID
end

@enduml
```
